lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 asattapadeea ghar 1 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਹੋਈਐ ਜਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਹੋਇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai kanchan hoeeai jaan har kee hoe rajaae |1|
lines.english: He meets the True Guru, and he is transformed into gold, if it is the Lord's Will. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karam hovai taa satigur paaeeai vin karamai paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: If it is in his karma, then he finds the True Guru; without such karma, He cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਾਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te har paaeeai saachaa har siau rahai samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord is found through the True Guru, and then he remains merged with the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har har naam chit laae |
lines.english: O my mind, focus your consciousness on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨੀ ਨਹ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur te har bujheeai garabh jonee neh paae |2|
lines.english: Through the True Guru, the Lord is realized, and then, he is not consigned to the womb of reincarnation ever again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਤਾਂ ਇਹ ਸੰਸਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te giaan aoopajai taan ih sansaa jaae |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom wells up through the True Guru, and then this cynicism is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਏ ਜਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mukat duaaraa soee paae ji vichahu aap gavaae |3|
lines.english: He alone finds the Door of Salvation, who eradicates self-conceit from within himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee jeevat marai mar jeevai sabad kamaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the mortal dies in life, and by so dying, lives to practice the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰੁ ਚਰੈ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਏ ਪੁਰਖੈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: achar charai bibek budh paae purakhai purakh milaae |4|
lines.english: He eats the uneatable, and is blessed with a discriminating intellect; he meets the Supreme Person, the Primal Lord God. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਿਵ ਘਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਸਕਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee siv ghar jamai vichahu sakat gavaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the mortal is reincarnated into the Home of the Lord, having eradicated Maya from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੁਰ ਬਾਜੀ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਅਚੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਚਲੈ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaatur baajee sansaar achet hai chalai mool gavaae |
lines.english: The world is unconscious, like a passing show; the mortal departs, having lost his capital.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: laahaa har satasangat paaeeai karamee palai paae |5|
lines.english: The profit of the Lord is obtained in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation; by good karma, it is found. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vin kinai na paaeaa man vekhahu ridai beechaar |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one finds it; see this in your mind, and consider this in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har naamaan har ttek hai har har naam adhaar |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is my Anchor and Support. I take only the Support of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਉਤਰੇ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur paaeaa bhavajal utare paar |6|
lines.english: By great good fortune, the mortal finds the Guru, and crosses over the terrifying world-ocean. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਪਾਵਉ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kripaa karahu gur melahu har jeeo paavau mokh duaar |7|
lines.english: O Dear Lord, please be kind and lead me to meet the Guru, that I may find the Door of Salvation. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਲਾਟਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: masatak lilaatt likhiaa dhur tthaakur mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: The pre-ordained destiny inscribed on the mortal's forehead by our Lord and Master cannot be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਏ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਾਇ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak se jan pooran hoe jin har bhaanaa bhaae |8|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those humble beings are perfect, who are pleased by the Lord's Will. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਸਹੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jam ddandd sahai mar janamai vaaro vaar |
lines.english: Without the Name, it suffers punishment by the Messenger of Death; it comes and goes in reincarnation, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur bhette mukat hoe paae mokh duaar |1|
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, the world is liberated, and finds the Door of Salvation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਜਗੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bed baanee jag varatadaa trai gun kare beechaar |
lines.english: The world is involved with the words of the Vedas, thinking about the three gunas - the three dispositions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag gur pooraa paaeaa har har naam dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the mortal finds the Perfect Guru, and meditates on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re satigur sev samaae |
lines.english: O mortal, immerse yourself in service to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har aapanai bhaanai srisatt upaaee har aape dee adhaar |
lines.english: The Lord, by the Pleasure of His Own Will, created the Universe, and the Lord Himself gives it sustenance and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai satigur bhettiaa sabh janam savaaranahaar |2|
lines.english: The Lord, by His Own Will, leads the mortal to meet the True Guru, the Embellisher of all his lives. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਕੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har aapanai bhaanai man niramal keea har siau laagaa piaar |
lines.english: The Lord, by His Own Will, makes the mortal's mind immaculate, and lovingly attunes him to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu vaahu kar prabh saalaaheeai tis jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! Praise God as Great! No one else is as Great as He.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਤਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu vaahu baanee sat hai guramukh boojhai koe |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! Blessed and Great is the True Word of His Bani. Only a few, as Gurmukh, understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਾਹਰੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahib maaharo satigur deea dikhaae |
lines.english: The True Guru has revealed our True, Supreme Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase mel le karam paraapat hoe |3|
lines.english: When God's Grace is received, He Himself forgives the mortal, and unites him with Himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ਸਦਾ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਸੁਕੈ ਨਾ ਕੁਮਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har kai naae sadaa hareeaavalee fir sukai naa kumalaae |4|
lines.english: In the Lord's Name, it is forever rejuvenated; it shall never wither and dry up again. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਮਨੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਐ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit varasai man santokheeai sach rahai liv laae |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar rains down and the mind is satisfied, remaining lovingly attuned to the True Lord.
